summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sprint 2-4 loyalty system integration: Prophet pinned whisper, vault-aware loyalty hints, and loyalty email #3 functionality. Most features working correctly with minor backend config update issues.

critical_bugs.issue: Loyalty config updates return 'empty_patch' error when trying to update loyalty.hints_enabled or loyalty.email_delay_hours
critical_bugs.impact: Admin cannot toggle loyalty settings via API, though UI displays correctly

ui_bugs.issue: Loyalty hints and email toggles don't persist state changes due to backend config update failure

integration_issues.issue: Frontend shows 'Could not update loyalty config' error when toggling settings

passed_tests: GET /api/admin/bots/loyalty returns proper structure with 5 tiers
GET /api/admin/bots/jobs includes loyalty_email job running every 30 minutes
POST /api/admin/bots/loyalty/test-send works with valid email (status: sent)
Email delay validation properly rejects out-of-range values (0, 169)
ProphetPinnedWhisper component renders correctly on landing page
Language toggle (FR/EN) changes quote text in ProphetPinnedWhisper
All required data-testid attributes present: prophet-pinned-quote, prophet-pinned-signature, prophet-pinned-classification, prophet-pinned-footnote
Admin loyalty section UI displays correctly with all components
Loyalty active preview shows correct tier-based hints (silent tier shows '— silent —')
Loyalty email dispatch stats display correctly (sent=1, pending=1)
Test-send functionality UI components present and functional

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (ProphetPinnedWhisper fully working, admin UI mostly working)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix the loyalty config update issue in PUT /api/admin/bots/config endpoint. The endpoint returns 'empty_patch' error when trying to update loyalty settings, preventing admin toggles from persisting. The loyalty field is properly defined in models and allowed_top list, but the update logic may have a validation issue.
